mapper.select: SELECT ID, MAINT_INFO_ID, EQUIP_SMALL_CATEGORY_ID, EQUIP_SMALL_CATEGORY_NAME, EQUIP_INSTITUTION_ID, EQUIP_INSTITUTION_NAME, EQUIP_UNIT_ID, EQUIP_UNIT_NAME, SORT_ORDER, DEL_FLAG, DELETE_BY, DELETE_BY_NAME, DELETE_TIME, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME, UPDATE_BY, UPDATE_BY_NAME, UPDATE_TIME FROM E_MAINT_INFO_PART_ITEM WHERE MAINT_INFO_ID = #{maintInfoId} AND DEL_FLAG = 0 ORDER BY NVL(SORT_ORDER, 0), CREATE_TIME, ID
mapper.update: UPDATE E_MAINT_INFO_PART_ITEM SET DEL_FLAG = 1, DELETE_BY = #{loginUserId,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, DELETE_BY_NAME = #{loginUserName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, DELETE_TIME = #{now,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, UPDATE_BY = #{loginUserId,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, UPDATE_BY_NAME = #{loginUserName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UPDATE_TIME = #{now,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} WHERE MAINT_INFO_ID = #{maintInfoId,jdbcType=NUMERIC} AND DEL_FLAG = 0
